ddls:
CREATE TABLE "web_applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each web application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the web application */,
  "database_schema" TEXT /* Database schema used by the web application */,
  "app_description" TEXT /* Description of the web application */,
  "app_url" TEXT /* URL of the web application */,
  "app_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the web application was created */,
  "app_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the web application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the web application that executed the query */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the query */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of query (e.g., SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the query in milliseconds */,
  "affected_rows" INTEGER /* Number of rows affected by the query */,
  "query_description" TEXT /* Description of the query */,
  "query_tags" TEXT /* Tags assigned to the query */,
  "query_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the query was created */,
  "query_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the query was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES web_applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the query type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the query type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_performance" (
  "perf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query performance metric */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query being analyzed */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the query in milliseconds */,
  "affected_rows" INTEGER /* Number of rows affected by the query */,
  "complexity" REAL /* Complexity of the query (e.g., number of joins, subqueries) */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage of the query */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the query */,
  "disk_io" REAL /* Disk I/O usage of the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_performance_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_recommendations" (
  "rec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query being recommended for optimization */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recommendation */,
  "benefit" TEXT /* Benefit of implementing the recommendation */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of implementing the recommendation */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_recommendations_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "user_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_history" (
  "hist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query execution */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query being executed */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the query in milliseconds */,
  "affected_rows" INTEGER /* Number of rows affected by the query */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of query execution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_history_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query tag */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_tags_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query comment */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user adding the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "reply_to" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_comments_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_comments_reply_to FOREIGN KEY ("reply_to") REFERENCES query_comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query rating */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the query (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_ratings_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notif_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notif_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notif_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_optimization" (
  "opt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query being optimized */,
  "opt_text" TEXT /* Text of the optimization */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the optimization */,
  "benefit" REAL /* Benefit of the optimization (e.g., execution time reduction) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the optimization (e.g., index creation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_optimization_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_versioning" (
  "ver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query being versioned */,
  "ver_text" TEXT /* Text of the version */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "author" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_versioning_author FOREIGN KEY ("author") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_versioning_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_dependencies" (
  "dep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query that has a dependency */,
  "dependent_query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query that is dependent */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., table, view, function) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_dependencies_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_dependencies_dependent_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query being analyzed */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_stats_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)
